global_description: A small, compact bird with a rounded body and short tail. It has a mix of brown, gray, and black plumage with a distinctive pattern. The head is gray with a black bib and white cheeks, while the wings and back are streaked brown.

part_details.head: Gray with a prominent black bib and white cheeks.
part_details.wings: Brown with darker streaks, short and rounded.
part_details.body: Compact, rounded, covered in brown and gray feathers.

spatial_relations: The black bib is centered on the gray head below the beak.
White cheeks are positioned on either side of the head.
Brown streaked wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The short tail extends from the rear of the body.
